retry_reason: Failure can occur due to memory allocation issues or all SPIs being in use; retrying may succeed when memory is available or SPIs are freed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate and initialize a new xfrm6_tunnel_spi entry, including complex SPI search and hash table insertion. The refcount_set is only one minor step in the initialization, not the main focus.
